# Feb 17 2016 at 4:01 PM Rating: Good
araisfeld
Scholar
161 posts
Anyone know of a good farm spot for these with a fairly steady drop rate?

Thanks.
▲ Page top
Anyone know of a good farm spot?
QuoteReply
# Feb 22 2016 at 1:37 PM Rating: Excellent
snailish
4,580 posts
araisfeld wrote:
Anyone know of a good farm spot for these with a fairly steady drop rate?

Thanks.


tatankaseventh wrote:
Any mob listed on this page can drop it. The ones that are spiders will have a better chance. Ones that respawn the fastest will be good. There's no magic bullet for these types of drops.

Tat


As Tat says. My two cents:


I'd look for the easiest (so probably oldest era) zone with multiple mobs known for the drop. Then I would think about zones with lots of mobs (especially if farming easy cons). For this drop, for most classes that likely means Veksar or one of the PoP zones.

For me, since I play mostly a necro, Blackfeather roost would be my choice as I like kiting there. It would be a lousy melee farm zone until way above the NPC level though.


Keep in mind that a lot of NPC that drop these global items have not been reported here. So just because only 1 NPC for a given zone is listed that doesn't mean the entire zone won't. Look at the level ranges of the known kills. You can be a bit of a detective in this.
▲ Page top
Anyone know of a good farm spot?
QuoteReply
# Feb 19 2016 at 3:03 PM Rating: Excellent
tatankaseventh
Guru
783 posts
Any mob listed on this page can drop it. The ones that are spiders will have a better chance. Ones that respawn the fastest will be good. There's no magic bullet for these types of drops.

Tat
____________________________
Tatanka Wolfdancer, 115 Wood Elf Druid, 9 x 300+ Master Artisan, 7 maxed trophies (dang research! :)
Michone, 115 Troll Shadowknight
Anaceup Mysleeves, 115 Erudite Mage, 2 x 300 Master Artisan
Snookims Whinslow, 112 Erudite Enchanter, 2 x 300 Master Artisan
<Inisfree>, Tunare (Seventh Hammer!)

Gamewide random?
QuoteReply
# Sep 28 2007 at 6:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591948561042
2 posts
Im thinking these new loots are probably generic like sunshard ore and drop off anything within a certain level range.

I got this off a murkglider deathglider in WoS. A lot of other new things do too. Fine/Superb/Excellent silks, excellent animal pelts and a lot of tungsten ore. Apparently not all that rare of drops either since I got 11 of these new type of drops in an hours time.

Edited, Sep 28th 2007 10:24pm by freboi
